title: sarcanthus khasiaensis
intro: Sarcanthus khasiaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as a type of gentian. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial infections. The health benefits of Sarcanthus khasiaensis include its potential to alleviate fever, treat wounds, and ease respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal remedies, such as infusions and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
